title: Ship Agent Configuration
description: Schema for .ship/agents/<id>.jsonc — an agent definition that controls identity, skills, MCP servers, plugins, permissions, rules, hooks, and provider settings.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

id.description: Machine identifier. Must match the filename stem (e.g. rust-compiler.jsonc has id rust-compiler).

description.description: What this agent does — shown in `ship agents` and editor UI.

providers.description: Provider targets for this agent. Overrides the project-level providers list.

skills.description: Skill activation. Controls which skills are available to this agent.

refs.description: Skill IDs to activate. An empty array means all installed skills are available. Supports local IDs (e.g. tdd) and namespaced IDs (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/skill-name).

mcp.description: MCP server activation. Controls which MCP servers from mcp.jsonc are available to this agent.

servers.description: MCP server IDs to activate from .ship/mcp.jsonc. An empty array means all configured servers are available.

active_tools.description: MCP tool names to make visible beyond the default set. Used by orchestrator agents that need extended platform access.

plugins.description: Plugin installation intent. The compiler emits a manifest; the CLI executes the installs.

install.description: Plugin IDs to install, e.g. superpowers@claude-plugins-official, frontend-design@claude-plugins-official.

scope.description: Installation scope. project installs locally, user installs globally.

permissions.description: Permission overrides. Merged on top of the named preset from permissions.jsonc.

preset.description: Named permission preset from .ship/permissions.jsonc. Defines the base permission tier.

tools_deny.description: Tool patterns to deny. Merged on top of the preset's deny list. Supports glob patterns, e.g. Bash(rm -rf *), mcp__*__delete*.

tools_ask.description: Tool patterns requiring user confirmation before execution. Merged on top of the preset's ask list.

default_mode.description: Default permission mode for the agent session. Overrides the preset's default_mode if set.

rules.description: Inline rules appended to the agent's system prompt after .ship/rules/*.md files.

inline.description: Inline always-on rules. Use \n for line breaks. Appended after rule files from .ship/rules/.

hooks.description: Hook commands triggered by agent lifecycle events. Emitted into provider-specific hook config.

stop.description: Shell command to run when the agent session ends (Stop hook).

subagent_stop.description: Shell command to run when a sub-agent session ends (SubagentStop hook).

provider_settings.description: Provider-specific settings merged verbatim into the provider's config file. Keys are provider names (e.g. claude, cursor). Values are arbitrary objects passed through without transformation.

additionalProperties.description: Settings object for a specific provider. Any key/value valid in that provider's config file works here.
